title: The Goddess of 1967
overview: A rich young Japanese man (Rikiya Kurokawa) travels to Australia with the intention of buying a Citroën DS car (the goddess of the film's title - nicknamed the Déesse, after its initials in French, déesse being French for "goddess") that he has found for sale on the net. Once there things do not quite go to plan and he ends up on a road journey with a blind girl (Rose Byrne).
